forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely later this evening. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h tending northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south from the late morning. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the morning then turning westerly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h in the early afternoon then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before turning northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, most likely later tonight. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before turning northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, most likely later tonight. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning west to southwesterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.
Sun protection 12:10pm to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of the ranges, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers east of Ceduna, becoming less likely later tonight. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 12:00pm to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Ceduna. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before turning northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely later tonight. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before turning south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly before dawn then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending east to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the far northeast. Medium chance of showers east of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the middle of the day then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
